title: Battle.net Server Upgrade - 14 August 2018
content_html:
Blizzard has patched Classic Battle.net again.

The biggest change this patch is the restriction of legacy Diablo II 16-character CD-keys. Now in order to log in with Diablo II and/or its expansion pack, you will be required to register your CD-key on Battle.net with your Battle.net account, and then use the new 26-character game key instead.

Hi All,

Servers will be upgraded on Tuesday at 10am PST. Expected downtime is less than 1 hour.

Notable changes:

  • [D2] Network migration for inbound server traffic to increase performance and reliability
  • [D2] Disable the use of claimed 16 digit keys to prevent abuse
  • Improved service monitoring and alerting

Thanks, Classic Games

Edit:

Claim old 16 digits on your battle.net account here:

  • https://us.battle.net/account/management/claim-code.html

Look up your current cd keys:

  • https://us.battle.net/account/management/classic-games.html?license=20
  • https://us.battle.net/account/management/classic-games.html?license=23

Download Installers:

  • https://us.battle.net/account/management/download/
